---
title: QR-I Assignment 7
subtitle: Chapter 11 of the QR-A book
---

{{< include _use_webr.qmd >}}

```{r include = FALSE}
library(devoirs)
library(mosaicCalc)
source("_start-up.R")
```

{{< include _devoirs.qmd >}}

::::: {.callout-note collapse=true}
## Drill for Chapter 11 (Dynamics)

Open drill questions in [this document](https://dtkaplan.github.io/QR-A/Drill-11-dynamics.html){target="_blank"}

Remember to submit your drill answers through that document. But for the exercises in the present document, use the "collect answers" at the top of this page.

:::::

:::: {.callout-note collapse=true}
## Chapter 11 — Exercises

`r id <- "a7-ch11"`

These exercises draw on dynamics (Ch 11): state space, flow fields, and the SIR model.

::: {.panel-tabset}
## 1.

{{< include ../QR-A/_exercises/kid-ring-screen.qmd >}}

## 2.

{{< include ../QR-A/_exercises/fawn-shut-bulb.qmd >}}

## 3.

{{< include ../QR-A/_exercises/dolphin-bring-knob.qmd >}}

## 4.

{{< include _exercises/lynx-eat-hare.qmd >}}

:::

::::
:::::
